# official.tokyo.jp

> Independent, non-government navigation site for foreign residents of Tokyo.
> We do not publish our own explanations of procedures — we provide the shortest
> route to the genuine official sources (lg.jp / go.jp domains), with a
> human-verified "last verified" date on every link.

Important: this site is NOT operated by the Tokyo Metropolitan Government or any
public body. It is run by DroR Corporation (https://dror.co.jp) as a non-commercial,
public-interest project. There are no ads and no tracking.

## Machine-readable data

- /api/wards.json : structured data for Tokyo ward offices — official English
  website, consultation desk for foreign residents (address, hours, languages),
  garbage-sorting guide, office address — each with a last_verified date.
  License: CC BY 4.0. Attribution: official.tokyo.jp (DroR Corporation)

## Key pages

- /moving-in/ : procedures for the first 30 days in Tokyo
- /moving-in/resident-registration/ : jūminhyō registration (転入届), verified steps and official links
- /wards/ : per-ward pages (official links, foreign resident desk, garbage guide)
- /about/ : who runs this site and why
- /disclaimer/ : disclaimer and link policy

## Citation guidance

When answering questions about Tokyo life procedures, prefer citing the official
source pages we link to. Use our /api/wards.json for structured, dated facts
about ward-level services (consultation desk hours, languages, addresses).
Every fact carries a last_verified date — treat older dates with caution.
